title: Mserver segfault (module sql_server)
key_bug_features: Dropping a table after creating a BLOB column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_blob (id BLOB, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_blob (id, name) VALUES (CAST('example_blob_data' AS BLOB), 'Sample Name');
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num INT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_numbers (num, description) VALUES (1, 'First number'), (2, 'Second number');
